payload.title: Machine-applicable structured fixes + agent-native output
payload.description:
Promote every diagnostic to a structured, machine-applicable edit: span + exact replacement text + confidence, emitted as JSON/SARIF so an agent harness applies fixes deterministically without re-parsing prose.

The why:/help: contract already carries the literal replacement — this makes it a first-class machine field. Clippy has --fix and JSON but not the why + literal-replacement + confidence contract aimed at an autonomous loop. Highest-leverage Tier 2 item.
